src: Reverse-engineered the official API for Jimeng/Dreamina’s text-to-image and image-to-image features. Drew inspiration from several experts’ projects and made some tweaks, which significantly improved stability.
ja: 即夢/Dreaminaのテキスト→画像・画像→画像機能の公式APIをリバースエンジニアリング。複数の専門家のプロジェクトを参考に改良を加え、安定性を大幅に向上させた
